---
title: "Contact & Références"
---

## Me contacter
Vous pouvez me joindre directement via :
- Email : glaizal.matteo2@mail.dcu.ie
- LinkedIn : [Mon profil](https://www.linkedin.com/in/matteo-glaizal-28a799345/)

Contact Information
For any inquiries or opportunities regarding a 12-month work-study program (alternance) in Business Development starting in September 2026, you can reach me via:

Email: [glaizal.matteo2@mail.dcu.ie]

LinkedIn: Matteo Glaizal

Professional References
Dr. Damien Dupré, Assistant Professor in Business Analytics at DCU Business School.

Email: [damien.dupre@dcu.ie]
